_description: DOT — Airline Analysis and Scheduling Solution (693JK426R600002). Combined synopsis with 7 amendments. Tests amendment handling: questions deadline extended (Amendment 002), proposal due date changed (Amendment 007), plus demonstration scheduling and award estimate from Q&A.

deadlines.label: Questions submission deadline
deadlines.notes: Extended from original February 10 deadline per Amendment 002

deadlines.label: Demonstration scheduling deadline
deadlines.rawText: Offerors must schedule a demonstration by 12pm EST on or before March 2, 2026

deadlines.label: Proposal submission deadline
deadlines.notes: Changed from March 27 to March 30 per Amendment 007

_field_sources.QUESTIONS_DUE: Original: 'Please submit questions by Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at noon EST'. Amendment 002 (02/12/2026): 'extends the question submission deadline to 9:00 AM EST on February 13, 2026, due to an issue with the RFP attachment in SAM.gov'
_field_sources.OTHER_demonstration: RFP instructions: 'Offerors must schedule a demonstration by 12pm EST on or before March 2, 2026'. Not changed by any amendment.
_field_sources.PROPOSAL_DUE: Original: 'Thursday, March 27, 2026, at 10 AM EST'. Amendment 007 (03/10/2026): 'the proposal due date is hereby changed from March 27, 2026, to Monday, March 30, 2026, at 10am EST'
_field_sources.AWARD_ESTIMATE: Q&A section: 'What is the anticipated award decision date following proposal submission? Answer: April 1, 2026'
_notes: This RFP has 7 amendments — the correct dates are the FINAL amended versions
Amendment 001: corrected questions date from Feb 11 to Feb 10 (typo fix)
Amendment 002: extended questions to Feb 13 at 9AM due to SAM.gov attachment issue
Amendment 003: corrected proposal due day-of-week (Thursday→Friday, still March 27)
Amendment 007: changed proposal due from March 27 to March 30
March 30 falls during EDT but document states EST
